journal.emptyHint: Add the first milestone whenever the moment lands.

journal.noEntriesMatchHint: Try clearing the search or switching filter.
journal.aulaSectionBody: Aula connection is coming soon as a secure MitID-based import. Lille Liv does not store Aula passwords in the MVP demo.
journal.sheetDescriptionActivity: Add a small outing or everyday moment.

profile.title: Profile

saved.label: Saved
saved.description: Places you want to return to

profile.noFamilyDescription: Create a family first, then you can share a public profile.

auth.title: A calm space for the whole family
auth.body: Lille Liv gathers milestones, everyday glimpses and outings for you and the people you share life with.
auth.name: Your name
auth.checkInboxBody: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click it to sign in.
auth.inviteSubtitle: You've been invited to a family
auth.magicLinkExplainer: We send a one-time sign-in link to your email. No password.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language Lille Liv is shown in. You can switch back any time.
language.syncNote: When you're signed in, your choice is saved to your account so it follows you across devices.

family.addMembers: Add grandparents, your nanny, or the rest of the family

aula.title: Aula
aula.body: We're preparing a secure MitID-based connection. Until then, Lille Liv stores no Aula passwords.

families.title: Families in your neighbourhood
families.description: Connect with other families and plan outings together in your part of town.
families.loginRequiredBody: The family community requires Supabase. Set the env vars to enable it.

locked.title: Meet other families in your neighbourhood
locked.description: Sign in to share a small family card and connect with families nearby. Once a request is accepted you can chat and plan playdates.
locked.bullet1: Discover families by neighbourhood, age and interests
locked.bullet3: Private chat to plan visits and playdates

families.noFamilyBody: Next time you sign in we'll create a family for you automatically. You can also invite others from Profile → Family.

discover.search: Search by family name, neighbourhood or interest…
discover.emptyBodyFiltered: Try removing some filters — the community is still young.
discover.emptyBody: Invite other parents to create their family card — or share your own card publicly so others can find you.

connections.declineConfirmBody: The other family won't be told who declined or why.
connections.emptyIncomingBody: When another family sends you a request, it'll show up here.
connections.emptyOutgoingBody: Send a request from a family card to get started.
connections.emptyAcceptedBody: Find families in the Discover tab and send a request.

messages.emptyBody: Once you accept a connection, you can start a conversation from the family card.
messages.selectThread: Pick a conversation from the list.

detail.missingBody: This family doesn't have a public card, or has chosen to take it down.
detail.privacyNote: Lille Liv only shows what families have chosen to share. Children's names and photos are never public.
detail.requestDialogBody: Add a short hello — it makes acceptance more likely.
detail.requestPlaceholder: Hi! We're a family in Nørrebro with a 2-year-old — fancy meeting for a coffee?
detail.requestVisibility: Only visible to the other family.
detail.rateLimitBody: You can send up to {max} requests per day.
detail.reportDialogBody: We review every report manually. The family isn't told they were reported.
detail.blockDialogBody: You'll no longer see each other's profiles or be able to chat. Any open conversations are hidden.

publicEditor.footerNote: Children's names and photos stay private.

section.publicBody: When your family is visible, other parents in your neighbourhood can find and connect with you. Children's names and photos are never public.
section.visibilityBody: Your privacy level. You can change it any time — and you control each field below.
section.neighbourhoodsBody: Pick the neighbourhoods other families can find you in.
section.ageBandsBody: We only show age bands — never exact dates of birth or names.
section.interestsBody: Helps other families find you based on shared interests.
section.descriptionBody: A line or two about your family — where you live, what you like to do.
section.descriptionUpgrade: Switch to Moderate or Open to add a description.
section.descriptionPlaceholder: We're a family of four — Asta and Theo, plus two sleepy parents in Nørrebro. We love café mornings, puddles and the library at Blågårds Plads.
section.photoBody: A calm family photo — ideally without showing children's faces directly.
section.photoUpgrade: Switch to Moderate or Open to show a photo.
section.parentNamesBody: When connected to a family, they can message a specific parent by name.

minimal.title: Minimal
minimal.body: Neighbourhood + age + interests. No description, no photo. Strongest privacy.

moderate.title: Moderate
moderate.body: Everything from Minimal + a short family description + an optional family photo.

open.title: Open
open.body: Everything from Moderate + an optional reveal of parents' first names (only when connected).

taxonomy.cafe_desc: Calm breaks, high chairs and room for buggies.
taxonomy.playground_desc: Outdoor spots for sand, swings, climbing and fresh air.
taxonomy.indoor_play_desc: Indoor activities for rainy days and small motor adventures.
taxonomy.cinema_desc: Film and culture with room for babies and small children.
taxonomy.library_desc: Story time, children's books and free everyday magic.
taxonomy.swimming_desc: Warm pools, baby swimming and splashing.
taxonomy.event_desc: Seasonal experiences, festivals and special days.

prefs.personalInfoSubtitle: Grandparents, your nanny and co-parent see this when you share the journal.
prefs.interestsSubtitle: We use these to gather recommendations in the Discover tab and your profile feed.
prefs.neighbourhoodsSubtitle: Choose the neighbourhoods you spend time in so we prioritise nearby outings.
prefs.childAgeSubtitle: Used to filter places and events that suit the little one.
prefs.accountSubtitle: Role, language and notifications. You can always change these later.
prefs.notifications: Email notifications about new recommendations and family activity

accountSection.title: Account & privacy
accountSection.body: Data is stored in Supabase in the EU region with RLS policies so each family only sees their own. You can sign out here — all your preferences are safely stored for next time.
accountSection.notConfigured: Supabase is not configured in this local demo.

profilePage.loggedOutTitle: A personal space for the family
profilePage.loggedOutBody: Sign in with a magic link and open a private hub: profile, preferences, recommendations and a shared family space.
profilePage.tailoredFeedBody: Recommendations that listen to interests, neighbourhoods and your child's age.
profilePage.curatedOutingsBody: Cafes, playgrounds and experiences in Copenhagen for ages 0–6.
profilePage.sharedFamilySpaceBody: Invite grandparents, your nanny or co-parent.
profilePage.magicLinkBody: No password. EU-hosted. You decide who sees what.
profilePage.supabaseNotice: Login works when Supabase environment variables are set. Until then the journal is available as a demo.
profilePage.settingsDescription: Your account, family and personal preferences.
profilePage.inviteAccepted: You are now in the family.
profilePage.noFamilyBody: Next time you sign in we'll create a family for you automatically. You can always invite more people.

inviteForm.title: Add grandparents, your nanny or the rest of the family
inviteForm.doneBody: We sent an email (if an address was provided). You can also share the link yourself — it's valid for 14 days.
inviteForm.messagePlaceholder: Welcome in, Grandma — you can keep up with Asta's everyday life.

profileOverview.readyBody: The more you share, the better we can curate places, outings and events for you.
profileOverview.profileComplete: Your profile is fully filled in. Check the recommendations — we've tailored them for you.
profileOverview.noFamilyWaiting: When your account is set up, grandparents, childminders and co-parents will appear here.

profileRecommendations.tailoredBody: We blend interests, neighbourhoods, and child age to find places that fit everyday life.
profileRecommendations.popularBody: Add interests, neighbourhoods and a child's age so we can personalise the list for you.
profileRecommendations.noEvents: No upcoming events right now — check back in a few days.

planVisit.notePlaceholder: Meet grandma at 10 at the entrance…

familyCard.descriptionPlaceholder: We’re a family of four — Asta, Theo and their parents.
familyCard.defaultDescription: Add a description so grandparents and family know what you use Lille Liv for.

marketing.metaTitle: Lille Liv — Copenhagen family life, gently organized
marketing.metaDescription: Find places. Save the moments. Together. A family guide and private journal for parents of 0–6 year olds in Copenhagen.

hero.lede: Lille Liv brings together cafés, playgrounds, libraries and museums across Copenhagen — alongside a private per-child journal where you and grandparents can share everyday glimpses and milestones.
hero.savedBody: Mormor sent a heart to Asta's moment 💛

discover.title: Find places
discover.body: Hand-picked cafés with room for a stroller, playgrounds with shelter, libraries with read-alouds, and museums that welcome the little ones.
discover.footer: Filter by age, neighbourhood and weather

journal.title: Save the moments
journal.body: A private timeline per child: milestones, small outings, everyday glimpses. No public feeds — just you and the people you choose.

share.title: Share with whom you choose
share.body: Invite grandparents, a caregiver or a co-parent. Everyone sees the same calm feed — and can react with a heart, a clap or a smile.

appPreview.title: Everyday glimpses — gathered for each child.
appPreview.body: Add a moment from the café, the park or home. Mormor and Morfar see the same calm feed — and can send a heart back.
appPreview.moment1Caption: Asta dared on her own. We both clapped.
appPreview.moment2Caption: Home for nap with a full belly.
appPreview.reactionBody: sent a heart to Asta's moment 💛

grandparents.title: Follow along — without asking.
grandparents.body: Lille Liv is built so grandparents who may not live in Copenhagen can follow daily life without joining Facebook or Instagram. No public feeds, no ads — just your kids and grandkids.
grandparents.bullet1: A calm feed of photos and small stories
grandparents.bullet2: React with heart, clap or smile — no comment threads
grandparents.bullet3: Works on phone, tablet and laptop

faq.title: What we get asked the most

items.a: Yes. Each child's journal is private to your family and shared only with people you invite. We use Postgres Row-Level Security so no other family — or Lille Liv itself — can see your moments. Hosting is in the EU.
Lille Liv is free during beta. We will add a family subscription later — existing families will be told first, and the first 30 days will always remain free.

items.q: What age range is it for?
items.a: 0–6 years. Places are curated for young families — cafés with stroller room, playgrounds with shelter, libraries with read-alouds. When your child turns six you can take the journal with you as an export.

items.q: Is Lille Liv on iOS and Android?
items.a: We start on the web (works in Safari and Chrome on iOS and Android), with a native app to follow later in the year. Everything you build up now carries over.

items.q: Can I take my data with me?
items.a: Yes. Exporting the whole journal as JSON plus every photo at original resolution is free and always available from Profile → Account. No lock-in.

items.q: What about GDPR and children's photos?
items.a: You own the photos. We store them in the EU, encrypted, accessible only to the family members you have invited. We never sell data and we do not train AI models on your content.

footerCta.title: Lille Liv is waiting — free during beta.
footerCta.body: Create your family in a minute. Invite Mormor, Morfar and a co-parent afterwards.

footer.tagline: Copenhagen family life, gently organized. Made by two parents on parental leave in Nordvest.
